title: Israeli military fighting in southern Lebanon as US-Iran talks postponed
Lebanese turtle conservationist Mona Khalil killed by Israeli strike
Steve Rosenberg: Moscow oil refinery attack brings Russia's war with Ukraine closer to home
Mona Khalil, Defender of Sea Turtles, Killed in an Israeli Strike in Lebanon
text: For a quarter century, Ms. Khalil ran a guesthouse and worked to protect endangered sea turtles who every summer lay their eggs on a stretch of beach near Tyre, Lebanon.
